title: MineLoL 32x
description: One of Many Realistic Looks. Made for you to enjoy!
body:
_ALL video showcases of this pack is outdated, so there's currently no video I can show you. So if you make a video showcase of this pack, let me know. =)_


**----------------------ABOUT-------------------------**
This resource pack created way back in 2012 is simply here to try to make your Minecraft textures a bit more realistic than the default 16x textures. Most of the textures (as well as the animal textures) are made from real photos edited to fit into minecrafts blocky form.


**----------------------HOW TO USE-------------------------**
If you want it too look just as the pictures:

INSTALL:**Iris Shaders** (to run shader packs) also helps your Minecraft run smoother

Shader Pack - **Complementary shaders** pack

SETTINGS:Make sure **RP support** is set to **Integrated PBR+**:
Go to **shader pack settings**: ESC>Options>Video Settings..>Shader Packs...>Shader Pack Settings...'


Then press on '**RP Support:**' until it says: '**Integrated PBR+**' Then hit '**APPLY**' and you're all set!



**---------------PATREON--------------------**
This 32x32 version will be kept free as it has always been. =)

Also have a second Resource Pack project I'm very excited about! A 512x Realistic PBR Pack, [take a look by clicking here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/pretty-realistic-pbr/)

For those who are interested in getting access to all my packs (up to 512x).. Go to my Patreon here for more info: https://www.patreon.com/CaspersTextures

A peak doesn't hurt ;D



**------------------Feedback-----------------**
If you have any feedback suggestions or need help, go join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/pXXCewPBhe). or comment below.


**-----------Thank You!-------------**
Lastly I just wanna say thank you for Everyone who has supported me throughout the years, no matter how small and that I can't wait to share this new journey with you. =D
